title: TCP
helpOutput:
Usage: tcp [<options>] <host> <port>

  Check TCP port connectivity and optionally grab a banner.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -b, --banner         Attempt to grab server banner
  -c, --common         Scan common ports for the host
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <host>  Host to connect to
  <port>  Port number to check
